'''[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] Marie Peeno''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who lived in [[Fort Nowhere]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="JK">''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''</ref>

==Biography==
In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], she was [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Jerg]]'s second-in-command and, allegedly, his mistress.<ref name="JK" /> In her capacity she manned the [[blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]] turrets that formed the defense of [[Fort Nowhere]] and often she experienced false proximity alerts because of the native [[Bouncer]]s who happened to approach the sensors, and learned to ignore such notifications.<ref name="JK audio">[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Jedi Knight'' audio drama]]</ref>

[[Standard year/Legends|Years]] later, in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]] she noticed that all sixteen weather [[satellite/Legends|satellites]] operated by the colonists stopped transmitting about the same time, and they were unable to contact them again. That night [[Grif Grawley]] entered the [[Smuggler's Rest (Ruusan)|Smuggler's Rest]] to warn about an imminent [[Imperial Remnant|Imperial]] invasion, and inquired about the satellites. Asked about ships, she shook her head, as Jerg had left the previous month with all [[shuttle/Legends|shuttles]].<ref name="JK" /> 

The next day, Peeno with [[Dinko (Human)|Dinko]] manned one of the town's [[energy cannon]]s and spied an Imperial [[assault shuttle/Legends|assault shuttle]] making reconaissance flights. Thinking that the shuttle was part of a [[Vengeance Battle Group|larger force]], and that the Imperials probably wanted to talk, Peeno ordered Dinko to take the cannon off-line, allowing the shuttle to land inside the Fort.<ref name="JK" /> 

Representing the Empire, the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Sariss]] interviewed Mayor Devo, and then Peeno, about any [[archaeology/Legends|archaeological]] finds on the planet, and whether they had encountered any ruins or artifacts. After false promises that the Empire won't touch the illegal settlement, thanks to their cooperation, the shuttle left. Peeno approached Mayor Devo expressing her puzzlement about their questions, and suggested to him to keep it to himself, until they could find any treasures and keep them, but feared that the Imperials were not that stupid.<ref name="JK" /> 

Peeno saw to man the turrets,<ref name="JK" /> and found herself again with Dinko, discussing whether they were wrong to be alerted by the arrival of the Imperials after all. Peeno was ready to allow Dinko an early leave for tonight when he noticed an alarm blinking; Peeno dismissed it as yet one false alarm caused by the Bouncers, but she saw that it was not the case.<ref name="JK audio" /> She retreated to an underground bunker to coordinate the defenses for [[Battle of Fort Nowhere|the battle]]. With her was a teenager volunteer serving as weapons-control officer. On her [[computer monitor/Legends|monitors]] she saw debris from a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] falling on [[Katarn's Hill]], shot by Dinko. A volunteer warned her about the arrival of four assault shuttles and she ordered to launch [[missile/Legends|missiles]].<ref name="JK" /> She congratulated Dinko for his hit and suggested him to target the hovercraft as the first wave of TIEs was too close.<ref name="JK audio" />

She decided to arm more seven missiles when Dinko tried to warn her that something was locked on them and they should leave. She was killed during the explosion of the missile silos while she was ready to launch the missiles.<ref name="JK audio" />

==Personality and traits==
Peeno had short red hair and wore a nose stud.<ref name="JK" />

==Behind the scenes==
In the [[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight (audio drama)|audio adaptation]] of ''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]'', she was voiced by [[Louise Enyeart]].

In the novella Marie Peeno is in a bunker while Dinko is manning a cannon turret during the Battle; in the audio drama Peeno and Dinko are together in a missile silo, and die together while Peeno is arming the missiles.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]'' {{1st}}
